title: Create column with automation?
excerpt: Looking to use a form to collect info and then create the board from templates based on the response.  Additionally, want to add columns to that template based on the response.

posts.author: hrix (Heather Rix)
posts.cookedHtml: Looking to use a form to collect info and then create the board from templates based on the response. Additionally, want to add columns to that template based on the response.

posts.author: CharlotteK (Charlotte Kirkham)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey there! I’d love to help with this but I want to be sure I understand what you’re looking for.

Are you wanting to create items and columns on a board based on the form submissions you receive? If so, forms have to be created from a pre-existing board with the columns already set up that you would like to function as questions in your form.

If I am not quite understanding what you need, please let me know! I’d love to see screenshots to better conceptualize your workflow and figure out a solution.

posts.author: hrix (Heather Rix)
posts.cookedHtml: Hi, the use case is a person fills out a form with the products they’re ordering. We then want the board to include different columns depending on the products selected.
